description: Create a UML class diagram for a Patient Portal system in Wondershare EdrawMax. Model the following classes: Patient (attributes: patientId: int, firstName: String, lastName: String, dateOfBirth: Date, email: String; methods: getFullName(): String, getAge(): int), Doctor (attributes: doctorId: int, name: String, specialty: String, licenseNumber: String; methods: getAvailableSlots(date: Date): List), Appointment (attributes: appointmentId: int, dateTime: DateTime, status: String, notes: String; methods: cancel(): void, reschedule(newDate: DateTime): void), Prescription (attributes: prescriptionId: int, medication: String, dosage: String, startDate: Date, endDate: Date; methods: isActive(): boolean), and MedicalRecord (attributes: recordId: int, diagnosis: String, treatmentPlan: String, createdDate: Date; methods: addNote(note: String): void). Establish relationships: Patient (1) to Appointment (*), Doctor (1) to Appointment (*), Patient (1) to MedicalRecord (*), Doctor (1) to Prescription (*), and Patient (1) to Prescription (*). Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/patient_portal_class_diagram.eddx and export the diagram to /home/ga/Documents/patient_portal_class_diagram.png.
